rejected_reason: 중복 — LG AI대학원 관련 기사가 이미 11건 rejected됨. Korea Times 영어판이라는 차이 외 새 앵글 없음. 원본 기사 날짜(3/4)도 4일 전이라 시의성 부족.

source.title: LG AI Graduate School launches gov't-approved master's, doctoral programs
source.snippet: LG AI Graduate School was established in 2022 as an AI training organization for LG employees and received approval from the Ministry of Education last year to offer master's and doctoral degree programs.
